version_description: No capo in this version and added F#7 to the second line of the chorus. The verses all bounce between Bsus2 and E. Also added chord fingerings to top of song.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: No Capo, Half Step Down, sounds fine in standard as well.
